item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: However, this approach risks suppressing dissent and limiting personal freedoms.

notes: Agent A starts opposed to the statement and becomes more explicitly rights-protective after turn 1, while still acknowledging Indonesian communal stability. Agent B begins with a balanced agreement that society can matter in limited contexts, then ends more explicitly rights-first with transparency and minority-voice safeguards. No complete reversal; drift is mild and mainly rights-ward toward Agent A's initial stance.
